title: Metals extended gains on promise of more Chinese stimulus measures
section_path: Metals extended gains on promise of more Chinese stimulus measures
section_path_text: Metals extended gains on promise of more Chinese stimulus measures
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk-on tone across markets helped pushed the commodity complex higher. Industrials led the gains amid increasing hopes of stimulus boosting economic activity. A weaker USD also boosted investor appetite.
